manifests.contents:
[package]
name = "uhtcp-core"
edition = "2021"
version = "0.0.1"
build = "build.rs"

[dependencies]
memmap2 = "0.5"
serde_json = "1.0"
tiny_http = "0.11"

[dependencies.serde]
version = "1.0"
features = ["derive"]

[build-dependencies]
cc = "1.0"

[[bin]]
path = "src/main.rs"
name = "uhtcp-core"
edition = "2021"
required-features = []

skeleton.config_file:
[build]
# rustc-wrapper removed to avoid requiring sccache in CI environments

[term]
verbose = true
skeleton.lock_file:
version = 3
